title: No Feather Falling
description: A simple datapack that removes Feather Falling from boots
body:
This simple datapack removes the Feather Falling enchant from boots when equipped. This brings back some of the fear and strategy instead of just being able to fall hundreds of blocks with no penalty.

**Only Works in 1.21.5 or above due to the command structure, so I can't backport it either.**

Report any bugs or issues in my discord.
